title: Skillbook Evidence Entry
description: A single piece of evidence for or against a policy. Evidence is the system of record for a policy's confirm/contradict counts; those counts are a derived projection recomputed from the evidence array. See .agents/skillbook/README.md.

ts.description: Unix epoch seconds when the evidence was recorded.

type.description: Whether this evidence confirms or contradicts the policy.

eval_id.description: Identifier of the eval run (and fixture) that produced this evidence. Doubles as the idempotency key: a second confirm/contradict with the same eval_id on the same policy is a no-op.

pass.description: The raw eval pass/fail outcome. A passing eval that exercised the policy is 'confirmed'; a failing one is 'contradicted'.

context_type.description: Provenance of the evidence. 'external' (eval pass/fail, incident, critique) is weighted 1.0; 'self-referential' (an agent's own claim) is weighted 0.25.

reason.description: Optional human-readable rationale, required in practice for contradictions.
